text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
choice_data_list: You sure are chipper this morning.
You sure are chipper this morning.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I slept really well last night thanks to the thermal
eye mask a darling pony gave me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I liked it so much, I bought some more. You can
have one to try out.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You'll be sure to sleep like a baby tonight. I
guarantee it!
